channel.title: The Grant Desk - Africa, next 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Africa, next 30 days.

item.title: Heart2World Publishing: Heart2World Book Prize 2026 (Inaugural, Poetry)
item.description:
Organisation: Heart2World Publishing

Location: Nigeria; open to Nigerian writers currently residing in Nigeria.

Award: NGN 250,000 cash prize, a full publishing and marketing package (valued at approximately NGN 5 million), and 100 percent net royalties on the published collection. No entry or reading fee.

Duration: One-off prize; publication to follow

Deadline: 05 Aug 2026

The inaugural Heart2World Book Prize, from Heart2World Publishing, is a poetry prize for a full-length collection by a Nigerian writer. AWARD: NGN 250,000 cash prize, a full publishing and marketing package (valued at approximately NGN 5 million), and 100 percent net royalties on the published collection. ELIGIBILITY: Nigerian citizens currently residing in Nigeria; submit an unpublished poetry collection of 30 to 35 poems written in English. There is no entry or reading fee (verified on the funder page). DEADLINE: 5 August 2026. Apply via the prize page.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).

item.title: ARUA: Early-Career Research Fellowships 2026 (Option 2)
item.description:
Organisation: African Research Universities Alliance (ARUA), with the Mastercard Foundation and Carnegie Corporation of New York

Location: Host and affiliated institutions of ARUA's Centres of Excellence and Africa-Europe Clusters of Excellence; for African early-career researchers

Award: Monthly stipend of USD 2,000, a modest accommodation payment, and travel support (return ticket to host institution). 6-month fellowship.

Duration: 6 months (Option 2: September 2026 to February 2027)

Deadline: 15 Jul 2026

An Early-Career Research Fellowship program funding up to 42 early-career researchers to conduct globally competitive research at the host and affiliated institutions of ARUA's 13 Centres of Excellence and the 22 Africa-Europe Clusters of Excellence. ELIGIBILITY: early-career researchers no older than 35 at the time of application; at least 70 percent of fellowships are reserved for female candidates. STRUCTURE: each fellowship lasts six months; Option 2 runs September 2026 to February 2027 (Option 1, March to August 2026, has closed). SUPPORT: monthly stipend of USD 2,000, a modest accommodation payment, and travel support (return ticket to the host institution); successful candidates are contracted by ARUA for six months. Deadline for Option 2: 15 July 2026.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
